cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22)

project(libass LANGUAGES C)

# libass 原生项目使用 autotools。为 Android/NDK 构建提供精简 CMake 封装：
# - 仅启用 FreeType + HarfBuzz + FriBidi（不依赖 fontconfig/coretext/directwrite）
# - 生成最小 config.h（原项目由 autotools 生成）
# - 必须为 STATIC：与主程序同 so、同 C 运行时，避免 ass_free_track 时 Scudo misaligned free
set(LIBASS_SRC_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libass")

file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/config.h"
"/* Generated by CMake (Hvideo) */\n"
"#pragma once\n"
"\n"
"#define HAVE_STRDUP 1\n"
"#define HAVE_STRNDUP 1\n"
"#define CONFIG_SOURCEVERSION \"unknown\"\n"
)

set(LIBASS_SOURCES
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_bitmap.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_blur.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_cache.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_drawing.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_filesystem.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_font.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_fontselect.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_library.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_outline.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_parse.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_rasterizer.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_rasterizer_c.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_render.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_render_api.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_shaper.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_string.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_strtod.c"
    "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}/ass_utils.c"
)

add_library(libass STATIC ${LIBASS_SOURCES})
set_target_properties(libass PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

target_include_directories(libass
    PUBLIC
        "${LIBASS_SRC_DIR}"
    PRIVATE
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}"
)

# 依赖：FreeType / FriBidi / HarfBuzz
target_link_libraries(libass
    PUBLIC
        freetype
        fribidi
        harfbuzz
)
